---
name: Pull Request
about: Contribute code changes to the project
title: "[PR] "
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what this pull request does.

## Related Issue

Closes #(issue number) or Relates to #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (fixes an issue without changing existing features)
- [ ] New feature (adds new functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing functionality is changed)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Changes Made

- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing

- [ ] I have tested these changes locally
- [ ] I have run `.\tests\Invoke-IntegrationTests.ps1` and it passes
- [ ] I have run PowerShell Script Analyzer and addressed warnings:
  ```powershell
  Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path .\scripts\install.ps1,.\scripts\uninstall.ps1,.\scripts\check-tasks.ps1,.\src\Win11DarkMode.psm1
  ```

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style and conventions
- [ ] I have added or updated relevant comments/documentation
- [ ] I have updated [README.md](../../README.md) if needed
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] No new warnings from PowerShell Script Analyzer

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots or screen recordings if this is a UI/visual change.

## Additional Context

Add any other context or notes for reviewers here.

---

Thank you for contributing! Your effort helps improve this project for everyone.
